rulings.Case Title: JENNY J KIM VS. 1856 FRANKLIN STREET HOA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday May 25, 2017, line 5. DEFENDANT JENNIFER SHEVOCK, CAROLINA EKSTROM, JONATHAN EDWARDS, 1856 FRANKLIN STREET TIC (SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer as to the second cause of action is sustained without leave to amend, and as to the fourth cause of action with leave to amend. Defendants' demurrer on the ground that another action exists against the same parties and for the same causes of action is OVERRULED. =(501/REQ)
